summary.problem: The documented verification frontdoor was implemented as a `node` script even though this FlexNetOS host runtime does not expose a standalone `node` binary.
summary.repair: Repointed `planning-spine:verify` to Bun, added runtime-report emission to the verifier, and documented the Bun-backed frontdoor without changing the package deliverables or the v0/RFC/post-v0 boundary.
summary.result: The documented `bun run planning-spine:verify` command now runs live on this host and emits a machine-readable runtime report with a passing outcome.

verification_commands.purpose: Run the documented verification frontdoor in the real host runtime.
Verify the generated runtime report is valid JSON.
Capture a stable digest for the runtime proof artifact.

diagnostics.command: which bun && bun --version && which node && node --version
diagnostics.observed: bun present at /home/flexnetos/.local/bin/bun, bun 1.3.14, standalone node absent on PATH

boundary_checks: v0, RFC, and post-v0 scope markers remain present in planning-spine-v0/README.md.
No Docker-first or broad integration work was added.
